title: bilabrella altior
intro: Bilabrella altior, also known as the 'greater bilabrella,' is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Consuming Bilabrella altior may provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Bilabrella altior can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments, including colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
